What you expected to happen.

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 WSL2, macOS 14)
- Python version: (run `python3 --version`)
- CiteSeal version / commit: (run `git rev-parse --short HEAD`)
- Command used: (e.g. `python tools/fetch_x.py timeline --handle ...`)

## Logs / error output

```
Paste relevant log output here. Remove any personal credentials or session tokens.
```

## Archive item (if applicable)

If the bug is related to a specific archived item, share the `tweet_id` or the relative path under `accounts/`. Do **not** share third-party media content.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have removed all personal credentials and session tokens from logs.
- [ ] I am using content I am authorized to access with my own browser session.
- [ ] I have checked existing issues for duplicates.
